rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible identifiers and feature names in type-level contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
Guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using subcomponent paths in type contracts.
Only include concrete bounds or named constants in type-level assumptions and guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract statements.
Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their scope in AGREE
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
